title: ferray-ufunc: no bitwise_count (popcount) — NumPy 2.0 added it
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy 2.0 added np.bitwise_count (population count / hamming weight) as a ufunc. ferray-ufunc's bitwise module has and, or, xor, not, left_shift, right_shift, invert — but no popcount. Rust has count_ones() as an intrinsic on integer types, and modern CPUs have POPCNT instructions. Easy to add.
